about.personality: Mocha is a gentle and curious [Classic Siamese](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thai_cat) cat who loves ~~terrorising~~ exploring every corner of the house. He's **incredibly** affectionate and **always** greets his humans at the door.
quirks: Chirps at birds through the window
Loves to knock things off tables
Has a **very specific** meow for dinner time
Sits like a _perfect loaf_ when content

routine.wakeUp: **6:00 AM** - Morning stretches and window watching
routine.breakfast: **7:00 AM** - Wet food and fresh water
routine.napTime: **11:00 AM - 3:00 PM** - Extended nap in _favourite spots_
routine.dinner: **6:00 PM** - Second meal of the day
routine.bedtime: **10:00 PM** - Settles down for the night
